CustomField.description: NOT FOR LAYOUT: Field added by Chris Collins, 11/9/2019 for syncing Mail Hold status with MDM (Semarchy). Current logic dictates a pass through of true/false and original Mail Hold field was text/picklist. This field will be populated via formula/process that will based off of original mail hold field. Anything other than "None" and this field will be true.
CustomField.label: Mail Hold Active
